name: Secret Hitler
description: Secret Hitler is a 1930s-era social-deduction game from the Cards Against Humanity team — players are randomly dealt Liberal, Fascist, or the secret Hitler role, then take turns nominating chancellors who draw from a stacked policy deck and quietly enact Liberal or Fascist laws. Liberals must enact five Liberal policies or assassinate Hitler; Fascists win by enacting six Fascist policies or successfully electing Hitler as chancellor late in the game. A taut, paranoid, voting-driven thriller for five to ten.
